text:
Hrm, have played with the Mix_OpenAudio settings in nil_client.cpp
and am beginning to think it might not be a bug in NIL but a bug in
SDL11 
or maybe some step isn't being taken to ensure proper audio
initilization....

will dig a little further as time permits, gonna have to read the SDL11
docs...

:/
